answers: Arduino = open-source microcontroller platform. Easy to program (C/C++ based), tons of sensors and shields available.
Beginner projects: LED blinker, traffic light, temperature display, servo motor control, ultrasonic distance sensor.
Arduino programming: setup() runs once, loop() runs forever. Use digitalRead/Write, analogRead/Write for I/O.
Arduino shuru: kit keno, Arduino IDE install koro, LED blink code likho (prothom project), tarpor sensor add koro.
